multi-enum-select.label: Multi Select
multi-enum-select.description: Select multiple options from a list
multi-enum-select.enum.label: Options (one per line)
multi-enum-select.enum.description:
Enter one option per line. You can also add a value and a label separated by a colon (e.g. "label:value").
If no value is provided, the label will be used as the value
multi-enum-select.default.label: Default value
multi-enum-select.default.description: Set the default value of the field in STRING format, be careful with the syntax, ex: "option-1,option-2"
